_comment: Days and times the eBay notification should fire. Times are PST (America/Los_Angeles). fire_window_minutes is how long after the scheduled time the bot is still allowed to fire — gives slack for cron-job.org being a few minutes late.
_shifts: Mon-Thu: Ruby (1 PM – 10 PM PST). Fri-Sun: Elijah (2 PM – 2 AM PST).
